prompt.description: Research task for the agent. Free-form text.

model.description: Model for the agent; the provider is inferred from the model. claude-code uses 'fable' (most capable), 'opus', 'sonnet', or 'haiku'; codex uses 'gpt-5.5' or 'gpt-5.4-mini'. Defaults to the credential-aware provider's default model: codex/gpt-5.5 when Codex credentials are configured, otherwise claude-code/sonnet. The live MCP input schema constrains this to the union of the configured providers' models.

preamble.description: Optional prose prepended verbatim to the generated agent context file (e.g. CLAUDE.md for claude-code) before the auto-generated environment section.

output_path.description: Optional. Where the agent should write its final artefact (e.g. /out/summary.md).

output_format.description: Optional. Expected shape/format of the output.

success_criteria.description: Optional. Checklist of conditions the output must satisfy.

background.description: When true, returns immediately with {job_id, status:"running"} instead of blocking; poll with sandbox_status / sandbox_wait, cancel with sandbox_cancel.
